drawerSubtitle: Set once · Updates runway & burn calculations
balanceDescription: Your cash on hand right now — checking accounts, savings, petty cash. This drives your runway calculation.
balanceSetRunway: Your runway will be recalculated using this value.
fixedDescription: Costs that stay the same every month regardless of revenue. These are subtracted from gross profit to calculate net profit and daily burn rate.
variableDescription: Costs that scale with your volume — commissions, shipping, ad spend. These are used in contribution margin analysis.
